org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.sbml.SBMLSpecies

Package
Description
org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.sbml
Systems Biology Markup Language (SBML) loader for JScience.

    SBMLModel.getBoundaryMetabolites()

    Returns the list of internal metabolites (non-boundary species).
